class.name: SlangEntryPoint
class.description: Represents a function that can be used as the starting point for execution within Slang. See the [url=https://docs.shader-slang.org/en/latest/external/slang/docs/user-guide/02-conventional-features.html#shader-entry-points]Slang documentation[/url] for more information.

method.name: get_name
method.description: Returns the name of this entry-point function.
